title: Newbie Questions about building an app
excerpt:
Hi, 
I just created my account and I have a few questions about building an app. 

Does Monday labs come with a specific plan?
Do I absolutely need to code to design the app?

posts.author: queendys (Orianne Toure)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I just created my account and I have a few questions about building an app.

  1. Does Monday labs come with a specific plan?
  2. Do I absolutely need to code to design the app?
